segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why did Elizabeth tell Nigel that she was going to the dentist?

translations.zh-Hans: 伊丽莎白为什么告诉奈杰尔她要去看牙医？

segments.text: I crossed the street to avoid meeting him, but he saw me and came running towards me.

translations.zh-Hans: 我穿过马路想避开他，可他看见了我，朝我跑了过来。

segments.text: It was no use pretending that I had not seen him, so I waved to him.

translations.zh-Hans: 假装没看见他已经没有用了，于是我向他挥了挥手。

segments.text: I never enjoy meeting Nigel Dykes.

translations.zh-Hans: 我从来都不喜欢遇见奈杰尔·戴克斯。

segments.text: He never has anything to do.
No matter how busy you are, he always insists on coming with you.

translations.zh-Hans: 不管你多忙，他总是坚持要跟着你。

segments.text: I had to think of a way of preventing him from following me around all morning.

translations.zh-Hans: 我只得想个办法，不让他整个上午都跟着我到处走。

segments.text: Hello, Nigel, I said.
Fancy meeting you here.
Hi, Elizabeth, Nigel answered.

translations.zh-Hans: “你好，伊丽莎白。”奈杰尔回答道。

segments.text: I was just wondering how to spend the morning.

translations.zh-Hans: “我刚才还在琢磨上午怎么打发呢。”

segments.text: Until I saw you.
You're not busy doing anything, are you?
No, not at all, I answered.
I'm going to.
Would you mind my coming with you?
He asked before I had finished speaking.
Not at all, I lied.
But I'm going to the dentist.
Then I'll come with you, he answered.
There's always plenty to read in the waiting room.

translations.zh-Hans: “候诊室里总有很多东西可以看。”
